markdown:
# Druidic Warrior

You learn two Druid cantrips of your choice. [[guidance]] and [[starry-wisp|Starry Wisp]] are recommended. The chosen cantrips count as Ranger spells for you, and Wisdom is your spellcasting ability for them. Whenever you gain a Ranger level, you can replace one of these cantrips with another Druid cantrip.
